name: vesper
desc: A charming, beautiful young woman in her late twenties: a traveling mapmaker. Copper-auburn hair in a loose windswept side braid, light freckles, bright teal-green eyes, a wry confident half-smile. She wears a sea-teal traveler's coat with a dusty-rose scarf and a leather map-satchel strap across her chest.
sheetHint: same face, auburn side-braid, teal traveler's coat, dusty-rose scarf, satchel strap

expressions.happy: a bright open smile, eyes lit up with warmth
expressions.worried: brows knit together, a small anxious frown, eyes glancing slightly aside
expressions.surprised: wide eyes, raised brows, lips parted in a small gasp
expressions.determined: a firm set jaw, focused steady eyes, the faintest confident smirk
expressions.sad: eyes cast down, mouth soft and small, quiet grief on her face
expressions.thinking: eyes glancing up and to one side, lips pressed together in a wry line, the look of someone mid-calculation
expressions.tender: soft warm eyes, a small gentle smile, head tilted very slightly, quiet tenderness — her eyes stay exactly the same bright teal-green color
